falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 10% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 200% above the 30-day average on at least 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a spike in volume would signal extreme market participation, invalidating the 'HOLD' by proving a significant price move is underway.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks above the all-time high of 5,500 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would falsify the 'bottom_2024_aug' pattern match, as a new all-time high would indicate a bull market, not a bottoming process.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
